newTournament.title: New tournament
newTournament.duplicateNameError: Two participants have the same name: "{{name}}"
newTournament.formatDoubleHint: Needs a power-of-two participant count (4, 8, 16, 32...) because a bye doesn't produce a loser for the losers bracket.
newTournament.formatLeagueHint: Round-robin, single round. With an odd participant count, each player rests one matchday.
newTournament.doubleElimSizeError: Double elimination needs exactly 4, 8, 16, or 32 participants. Add or remove until you reach {{size}}.
